description: Implement Licensing module: License Manager with full validation/enforcement, Feature Gates system. Expand the existing stub in src/licensing/.
steps: Create src/licensing/include/licensing/LicenseValidator.h - License key validation with format checking (structured key format: TIER-XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX-CHECK), checksum verification, expiration date parsing, seat counting, grace period logic. Structs: LicenseKey (tier, segments, checksum), ValidationResult (valid, reason, expiresAt, seatsAllowed, gracePeriodDays).

Create src/licensing/src/LicenseValidator.cpp - Implementation: parseKey, validateChecksum (simple hash-based), checkExpiration, enforceSeatLimit, calculateGracePeriod. License tiers enum: Free, Professional, Enterprise.

Create src/licensing/include/licensing/FeatureGate.h - Runtime feature flag system. FeatureGate class with isEnabled(featureName), getRequiredTier(featureName), registerFeature(name, tier, description), setCurrentTier(tier). FeatureDefinition struct. GracefulDegradation: when feature unavailable return appropriate fallback info.
Create src/licensing/src/FeatureGate.cpp - Implementation: feature registry (map of feature name to required tier), tier comparison logic, degradation callback support, feature usage tracking.

Update src/licensing/include/licensing/LicenseManager.h and src/licensing/src/LicenseManager.cpp - Integrate LicenseValidator and FeatureGate. Add methods: validateKey, getEntitlements, getSeatCount, getRemainingDays, isInGracePeriod.
Update src/licensing/CMakeLists.txt - Add new source files.
Create tests/licensing/test_license_validator.cpp - Tests for key parsing, checksum validation (valid/invalid keys), expiration checking, seat limits, grace periods.
Create tests/licensing/test_feature_gate.cpp - Tests for feature registration, tier-based enabling/disabling, degradation when feature unavailable, tier upgrade enables features.
Update tests/CMakeLists.txt - Add licensing test files, link threatone_licensing.
acceptance_criteria: cmake --build build compiles all new licensing code without errors
ctest passes all new licensing tests
License validator correctly rejects malformed keys and accepts well-formed keys
Feature gate correctly enables features based on tier and disables them when tier is insufficient
Grace period logic allows temporary access after expiration
findings: Implementation complete. Used separate TEST_CASE blocks (not SUBCASEs) per FEAT-001 findings. The djb2 checksum algorithm provides deterministic key validation. Key format: TIER-XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX-CHECK where TIER is FREE/PRO/ENT/ULT. Tier ordering Free<Professional<Enterprise<Ultimate maps to enum int values for comparison. All 530 tests pass including 42 new licensing tests.
